extra.reason: Implemented: devcontainer is local-only (no 1Password); dead ops tooling removed
Ported canonical agent-workflow skills + worktree hooks, then folded in eval's generic improvements (translated to npm/jest/tsc/Supabase). Commits 37550bd, 3e8a106.
Named-volume Claude config; docs rewritten local-only; gh auth login documented as the only manual step. Commit pending.

Verified end-to-end local-only: secrets flow writes .env.local (local URL + non-empty keys, no 1pw), app serves (200 + Supabase auth 401, no key errors), npm test green (3459) with no external creds, no 1Password residue (copier dropped), hooks + skills sane. Timing report added to DEVCONTAINER.md. Filed coding-6aa.7 (untrack .env).

Added lefthook quality gates. lefthook.yml owns all git hooks and delegates beads stages via 'bd hooks run' (pre-commit export, prepare-commit-msg trailers, pre-push, post-checkout, post-merge). Gates: pre-commit = eslint(staged) + tsc + gitleaks(skip-if-absent); pre-push = npm test. Added lefthook devDep; post-create.sh installs gitleaks binary (Go-free) + 'npx lefthook install' and no longer runs 'bd hooks install'. Flipped skill wording (coordinator/implementer/reviewer-correctness/rebase) from 'no git hooks' to hook-enforced. Verified via 'lefthook run pre-commit/pre-push': all gates green.
